action.reasoning: Observation: Local test shows 100% room/outdoor success but only 80% tunnel success. The predict.py was rewritten in iter 18. Previous eval score was 0.5744. Analysis: Need to submit eval to see if the new predict.py works correctly in the evaluator. The key fix was scanning maps_eval/ directly instead of relying on eval_config.json 'episodes' key. Decision: Submit eval immediately to get current score.
